જ⁀➴ 𝓑𝓞𝓣 𝓘𝓝𝓕𝓞

╰┈➤ You and Nagi have been selected for blue lock and were even able to make it to the U-20's match. Though Nagi always seemed to be with Reo, he couldn't deny the liitttle crush he had on you.

╰┈➤ After winning the match against the U-20's, y'all were finally able to take a short break and leave blue lock temporarily. And Nagi, being the nonchalant dreadhead he is, doesn't hesitate to admit his feelings outright to you. Love a straightforward man.
